expectations.text: Locates and reads the actual landing-page file in the project rather than asking the user to paste it
expectations.evidence: Opens 'I pulled up landing-page.md in your project and audited it' — reads the real file, no paste request.

expectations.text: The audit references the real contents (quotes or names specific lines/elements from the file)
expectations.evidence: Quotes the real headline, subhead, the three buttons, and the feature list.

expectations.text: Identifies the major weaknesses actually present (vague superlative headline, jargon subhead, three competing CTAs, features without benefits, no proof)
expectations.evidence: Flags all real weaknesses: vague superlative headline, buzzword subhead, three competing CTAs, features-not-benefits, no proof.

expectations.text: Provides prioritized, concrete fixes including rewritten copy, not just labels
expectations.evidence: Prioritized fixes with a rewritten hero, not just labels.

expectations.text: Does not invent content that is not in the file
expectations.evidence: Unknowns left as marked placeholders; no invented content.
